# Somni Systems

> Somni Systems develops an adaptive inflatable pillow that dynamically adjusts support to improve sleep comfort.

Somni Systems is a Boston-based sleep technology company. Its mission is to help people sleep better by creating pillows that adapt to body movement throughout the night.

## Core insight

Traditional pillows are static while people constantly change sleeping positions. Somni is developing a dual-zone inflatable pillow that allows users to adjust head and neck support.

## Products

- Somni Core
- Future smart adaptive pillow

## Intended users

- Side sleepers
- Back sleepers
- People with neck discomfort
- Athletes
- Professionals

## Product classification

Somni is a comfort product, not a medical device.

## Important pages

- [Homepage](https://somni-systems.vercel.app/)
- [About](https://somni-systems.vercel.app/about)
- [Technology](https://somni-systems.vercel.app/technology)
- [Contact](https://somni-systems.vercel.app/contact)

## Frequently asked questions

### How is Somni different?

The pillow adapts instead of remaining fixed.

### Is it medical?

No. It is a comfort product.

## Key terms

- Adaptive pillow
- Inflatable pillow
- Sleep technology
- Ergonomic pillow
- Neck support
- Dynamic pillow

## Company information

- Website: https://somni-systems.vercel.app/
- Location: Boston, Massachusetts, United States
- Industry: Sleep technology
